interfaces.name: Tui
interfaces.doc: A thread-confined TUI renderer over a `!Send` core (pidgin's `TuiCore`).

ops.name: open
ops.doc: Build a renderer over an in-memory terminal of `cols` x `rows`.

ops.name: tick
ops.doc: Render one frame; return the number of bytes written.

ops.name: set_size
ops.doc: Resize the terminal the next render reads (fallible).
